reason: Lumyn's repo-pack validator has been split below the Factory fail threshold but remains above the warning threshold. The architecture-budget logic and self-test fixture harness now live in focused helper modules; the remaining warning-level debt is isolated to the validator orchestration and must stay visible before future autoship cycles so new product work does not repeat the monolith pattern.
